lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਵਿਆ ਰਿਦ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਲਗਾਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: anadin har raviaa rid antar sehaj samaadh lagaahee |2|
lines.english: Night and day, they ravish and enjoy the Lord within the heart; they are intuitively absorbed in Samaadhi. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਇ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਸੇ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jeea daan dee tripataase sachai naam samaahee |
lines.english: Bestowing the gift of the soul, He satisfies the mortal beings, and merges them in the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਭੇਦਿਆ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸਾਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigurasabadee ihu man bhediaa hiradai saachee baanee |
lines.english: The Shabad, the Word of the True Guru, has pierced my mind. The True Word of His Bani permeates my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਲਖੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਲਖਿਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh alakh na jaaee lakhiaa guramukh akath kahaanee |
lines.english: My God is Unseen; He cannot be seen. The Gurmukh speaks the Unspoken.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦਇਆ ਕਰੇ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਜਪੀਐ ਸਾਰਿੰਗਪਾਣੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape deaa kare sukhadaataa japeeai saaringapaanee |3|
lines.english: When the Giver of peace grants His Grace, the mortal being meditates on the Lord, the Life of the Universe. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਮਨ ਹੀ ਮੰਨੁ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: man hee te man miliaa suaamee man hee man samaaeaa |
lines.english: From the mind, the mind merges into our Lord and Master; the mind is absorbed into the Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa bahurr na hovai guramukh sehaj dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: He does not come and go in renicarnation any longer; the Gurmukh meditates intuitively.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਏਕੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: eko ek vasai man suaamee doojaa avar na koee |
lines.english: Our One and Only Lord and Master dwells within the mind; there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੇ ਹੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਚਿ ਪਤੀਜੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: saache hee sach saach pateejai vichahu aap gavaaeaa |4|
lines.english: In truth, the True Lord is pleased with truth; eradicate egotism from within yourself. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਹੋਈ ॥੫॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam prabhoo te paaeeai jin kau dhur likhiaa hoee |5|4|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Name of God is obtained, by those who are so predestined. ||5||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਮੀਠਾ ਜਗਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: eko naam amrit hai meetthaa jag niramal sach soee |
lines.english: The One Name is Sweet Ambrosial Nectar; it is Immaculate Truth in the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Malaar, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਣ ਗੰਧਰਬ ਨਾਮੇ ਸਭਿ ਉਧਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gan gandharab naame sabh udhare gur kaa sabad veechaar |
lines.english: All the heavenly heralds and celestial singers are saved through the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਸਦ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar sad man vasaaeaa har raakhiaa ur dhaar |
lines.english: They contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad. Subduing their ego, the Name abides in their minds; they keep the Lord enshrined in their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਸੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jiseh bujhaae soee boojhai jis no aape le milaae |
lines.english: He alone understands, whom the Lord causes to understand; the Lord unites him with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮੑਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: man mere khin khin naam samaal |
lines.english: O my mind, each and every moment, dwell on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦੇ ਗਾਂਵੈ ਸਾਚਿ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anadin baanee sabade gaanvai saach rahai liv laae |1|
lines.english: Night and day, he sings the Word of the Shabad and the Guru's Bani; he remains lovingly attuned to the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਦਾਤਿ ਸਬਦ ਸੁਖੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਨਿਬਹੈ ਤੇਰੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee daat sabad sukh antar sadaa nibahai terai naal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Shabad is the Guru's Gift. It shall bring you lasting peace deep within; it shall always stand by you. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਪਾਖੰਡੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਚੂਕੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh paakhandd kade na chookai doojai bhaae dukh paae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs never give up their hypocrisy; in the love of duality, they suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: naam visaar bikhiaa man raate birathaa janam gavaae |
lines.english: Forgetting the Naam, their minds are imbued with corruption. They waste away their lives uselessly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਵੇਲਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਹਥਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਪਛੁਤਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eih velaa fir hath na aavai anadin sadaa pachhutaae |
lines.english: This opportunity shall not come into their hands again; night and day, they shall always regret and repent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮੈ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ਵਿਸਟਾ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mar mar janamai kade na boojhai visattaa maeh samaae |2|
lines.english: They die and die again and again, only to be reborn, but they never understand. They rot away in manure. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਨ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeevan mukat har naam dhiaaeaa har raakhiaa ur dhaar |
lines.english: Meditating on the Name of the Lord, they are Jivan-mukta, liberated while yet alive. They enshrine the Lord within their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਉਧਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam rate se udhare gur kaa sabad veechaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are imbued with the Naam, and are saved; they contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਮਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਊਤਮ ਬਾਣੀ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: man tan niramal niramal mat aootam aootam baanee hoee |
lines.english: Their minds and bodies are immaculate, their intellect is immaculate and sublime. Their speech is sublime as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਏਕੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਤਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eko purakh ek prabh jaataa doojaa avar na koee |3|
lines.english: They realize the One Primal Being, the One Lord God. There is no other at all. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸਮੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan raataa gur kee baanee sevaa surat samee |
lines.english: My mind and body are imbued with the Word of the Guru's Bani. My consciousness is immersed in His service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae prabh aape aape nadar karee |
lines.english: God Himself is the Doer, and He Himself is the Cause of causes. He Himself bestows His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਅਲਖ ਅਭੇਵਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਇ ਲਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar vasiaa alakh abhevaa guramukh hoe lakhaae |
lines.english: The Unseen and Inscrutable Lord dwells deep within. He is seen only by the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਵੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਚਲਾਇ ॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak jis bhaavai tis aape devai bhaavai tivai chalaae |4|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, He gives to whomever He pleases. According to the Pleasure of His Will, He leads the mortals on. ||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਵੈ ਘਰੁ ਦਰੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਸੁ ਥਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te paavai ghar dar mehal su thaan |
lines.english: Through the True Guru, the mortal obtains the special place, the Mansion of the Lord's Presence in his own home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਦੁਤੁਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 3 dutuke |
lines.english: Malaar, Third Mehl, Dho-Thukay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਚੂਕੈ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee chookai abhimaan |1|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, his egotistical pride is dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਲਿਲਾਟਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau lilaatt likhiaa dhur naam |
lines.english: Those who have the Naam inscribed on their foreheads,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਸਾਚੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anadin naam sadaa sadaa dhiaaveh saachee daragah paaveh maan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: meditate on the Naam night and day, forever and ever. They are honored in the True Court of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀ ਬਿਧਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਸਦ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: man kee bidh satigur te jaanai anadin laagai sad har siau dhiaan |
lines.english: From the True Guru, they learn the ways and means of the mind. Night and day, they focus their meditation on the Lord forever.
